"[10] INVOLVD STILL 97 1125 HAS CONES OUT - UNK 1185 ENRT 1 HOUR ETA "
"[5] HAS 1023'D FOR 1185 FOR 2 HRS, NOW ADVS 2 MORE HR ETA -- RP REQ 1185 THROUGH LAMO RDSD - UNK PROVIDER "
